action: Wire a real peer execution runtime to the filesystem terminal store and preserve reconciled indeterminate durability as a distinct evidence status.
finding: The durable journal's recorded-indeterminate-reconciled result is safe only after exact reread reconciliation. The caller may proceed as recorded, but evidence must retain the original durability classification.
verification: Source and adversarial test committed. Fresh-checkout execution was blocked because the run container could not resolve github.com.
evidence_strength: implementation committed; test committed; runtime execution pending
falsification_route: Execute the committed Node test in CI and reject the slice on duplicate append, lost durability_state, conflict acceptance, or failure to recover the exact terminal after injected directory-sync failure.
handoff: Add this test to the repository gate, then extend crash injection around lock acquisition, temporary-file sync, rename, parent-directory sync, and lock release. A later slice should remove the adapter normalization by teaching peer-execution-runtime.mjs to accept recorded-indeterminate-reconciled natively.
